title: arrhenatherum montanum
intro: Arrhenatherum montanum, also known as mountain melick or mountain oat, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum montanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
